q1.question: What age groups do you teach?
q1.answer: We offer courses for students from 6 to 18 years old.

q2.question: Do you offer online courses?
q2.answer: Yes, we offer both online and in-person courses

q3.question: Is there a free trial lesson?
q3.answer: Yes, there is a free trial lesson for LEGO robotics classes.

q4.question: Where is the academy located?
q4.answer: We are located in Plovdiv, 6-ti Septemvri blvd. 144a, LEVEL CENTER business building, floor 3

aboutUs.title: About Akava Academy
aboutUs.subtitle: A new vision in IT education, created with the mission to inspire and prepare the next generation of tech innovators through modern, interactive, and project-based learning methods.

story.title: Our Story
story.paragraph1: Akava Academy is the new vision in IT education for children in Bulgaria. Founded on July 4th, 2025 in Plovdiv, our academy brings a fresh approach to programming education, combining the most modern technologies with proven pedagogical methods.
story.paragraph2: Our idea was born from the deep conviction that every child has the potential to become a creator of technology, not just a consumer. In the digital era, programming is not just a skill - it is a new language that opens doors to endless possibilities for creativity, innovation, and professional development.
story.paragraph3: Although we are a new institution, our team consists of experienced IT professionals and educators who work in the technology industry and know what skills are truly necessary. We have created a diverse course program - from first steps in Scratch for the youngest, to advanced concepts in Python, web development, and mobile applications for older students.
story.paragraph4: We don't just teach children to write code - we develop logical thinking, problem-solving, creativity, and confidence. Each of our courses is carefully designed to be interactive, project-based, and most importantly - fun and inspiring.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To create a leading educational environment where every child can discover the magic of programming and develop the skills needed for success in the digital future. We provide quality, accessible, and exciting IT education that develops technical skills, critical thinking, creativity, and self-confidence.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: To become the most preferred IT academy for children in Bulgaria, transforming the way children learn technology. To inspire thousands of young minds to become creators of the future and show that with the right support and education, every child can achieve amazing things.

timeline.title: Our Journey
timeline.subtitle: The beginning of our exciting journey in the world of IT education

founding.title: Birth of the Vision
